report.summary: Cycle-close: Production still frozen at e3f63fc (2 days). 145 uncommitted files (+8 since last cycle). 716 published slugs (+5). Token-radar, risk-score, market-recap still unpublished. TS errors confined to non-critical examples file. No new commits this cycle.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: 1,251 page.tsx files in src/app — unchanged from prior cycle
716 published slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES (up from 711 — 5 new entries since last cycle, including defi-risk-scorer and sentiment-heatmap)
111 phantom slugs remain (published without page.tsx) — unchanged, mostly dynamic learn/blog/course routes
TypeScript errors confined to src/lib/structured-data.examples.ts (25 errors, all JSX syntax in a documentation-only file) — not blocking build due to ignoreBuildErrors:true
No new 'use client' + metadata export conflicts detected in recent changes
Live site HTTP check blocked by sandbox egress proxy — cannot confirm production page health this cycle

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: All 6 API route files structurally verified:
/api/prices — CoinGecko /coins/markets, TTL 60s, has stale cache fallback, X-Cache-Source header present
/api/fear-greed — Alternative.me /fng/, TTL 600s (10m), stale cache only, NO hardcoded fallback, NO X-Cache-Source header
/api/trending — CoinGecko /search/trending, TTL 300s, stale cache only, NO hardcoded fallback, NO X-Cache-Source header
/api/market-metrics — CoinGecko /global + Alternative.me, TTL 60s, has mock fallback object, uses non-standard X-Cache header
/api/market-dominance — CoinGecko /global, TTL 300s, FALLBACK_DATA constant for 8 coins, X-Cache-Source present — healthiest route
/api/defi-yields — DeFiLlama via lib/defillama, TTL 300s, NO fallback (error-only), NO X-Cache-Source — most fragile route
Rate limiting: 0 of 6 public data API routes implement checkRateLimit — only /api/health and /api/cache-stats have it
External API live health unverifiable from sandbox (egress blocked)

sections.title: DevOps
items: Latest committed deploy: e3f63fc (Apr 2) — production frozen 2 days, no new commits this cycle
145 uncommitted files (+8 from 137 last cycle): 20+ modified tracked files + 120+ untracked (reports, OG SVGs, design artifacts)
Build config stable: output=standalone, trailingSlash=true, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency=4, workerThreads=false, ignoreBuildErrors=true
Middleware verified: Edge-compatible with inline PILLAR_PAGES, security headers intact
TS errors in structured-data.examples.ts are non-blocking due to ignoreBuildErrors — but should be cleaned up
CRITICAL: Deploy needed to push 716 published page entries and accumulated work to production

sections.title: Project Manager
items: DELTA SINCE LAST CYCLE: +5 published slugs (711→716), +8 uncommitted files (137→145), 0 new commits
SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: Nothing deployed — all work remains in uncommitted state
CARRY-OVER P0: Commit 145 files + Vercel deploy — production frozen since Apr 2
CARRY-OVER P1: Promote 3 tool pages to PUBLISHED_PAGES (token-radar, risk-score, market-recap — still not in set)
CARRY-OVER P1: Add FALLBACK_DATA to 4 API routes (trending, fear-greed, market-metrics, defi-yields)
CARRY-OVER P1: Add rate limiting to all 6 public data API routes (currently 0/6 protected)
CARRY-OVER P2: Fix TS errors in structured-data.examples.ts (25 errors, documentation file)
CARRY-OVER P2: Scaffold page.tsx for 111 phantom slugs
BLOCKERS NEEDING JEFE: Commit + deploy authorization — sole blocker for all accumulated work
